title: Caged Mobs - Updated and Extra Compatibilities
description: Updates preexisting compatibilities and adds some more.
body:
Updates various compatiblities for Alex's Mobs, Ice and Fire, Mowzie's Mobs, Quark and Twilight Forest in [Caged Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/caged-mobs) and adds additional compatibilities for Alex's Caves, Farmer's Delight (and some addons), The Aether addons, The Undergarden, Friends and Foes, Trials Chambers Backport and more.



<details>
<summary>Updated Compatibility</summary>

[**Alex's Mobs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
<details>
<summary>Addition & Changes</summary>

Added mobs: Banana Slug, Bison, Bunfungus, Caiman, Catfish, Comb Jelly, Cosmic Cod, Flutter, Flying Fish, Giant Squid, Murmur, Rocky Roller, Skunk, Terrapin, Skelewag, Triops, Underminer, Skreecher, Orca, Hummingbird, Tasmanian Devil, Anaconda, Tiger, Snow Leopard, Spectre, Maned Wolf, Toucan, Anteaterm Gelada Monkey, Jerboa, Pupfish, Blue Jay, Rain Frog, Potoo, Mudskipper, Sugar Glider, Mantis Shrimp, Stradpole and Farseer (Miniboss)

Platypus now drops Platypus eggs for consistency
  
Mungus now drops Mungal Spores

Lowered Bear Dust droprate to 1% from 30%

If [Alex's Mobs Interaction](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs-interaction) is enabled, Banana Slugs drop Bananas and Flutter drop Azalea with Arrow Upgrade

</details>

[**Ice and Fire**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>
  
Added Amphithere
  
Wither Skeletons now drop Wither Bones with Ice and Fire enabled
</details>

[**Mowzie's Mobs**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)
<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>
Added mobs: Naga, Umvuthana (All variatons) and Umvuthi (Boss)
</details>

[**Twilight Forest**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
<details>
<summary>Fixes</summary>
Fixed the broken Maze (Mazebricks) environment preventing maze mobs being put in cages
</details>

[**Quark**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)

<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>
  
Parrots now drops Parrot Eggs

Ravager now drops Ravager Hide if [Quark Oddities](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark-oddities) is enabled
</details>

[**Upgrade Aquatic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)

<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>

Guardians and Elder Guardians now drop Perch, Pike and Lionfish

Elder Guardians now also drop Elder Eye
</details>

</details>


## Added Compatibility

[**Alex's Caves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
<details>
<summary>Added</summary>
  
Added mobs: Trilocaris, Grottoceratops, Tremorsaurus, Subterranodon, Vallumraptor, Relicherius, Ferrouslime, Notor, Teletor, Magnetron, Boundroid, Braniac, Raycat, Radgill, Nucleeper, Caniac, Gingerbread Man, Licowitch, Gummy Bear, Sweetish Fish, Caramel Cube, Candicorn, Tripodfish, Lanternfish, Sea Pig, Deep One(s), Mine Guardian, Gossamer Worm, Vesper, Underzealot, Watcher, Gloomoth and Corrodent.
    
Added bosses/minibosses: Atlatitan, Luxtructosaurus, Hullbreaker, Gum Worm, Forsaken and Tremorzilla

</details>

[**The Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) Addons

Use alongside [Caged Mobs Integration](https://modrinth.com/datapack/caged-mobs-integration) which adds Aether compatiblity.
<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

[**Deep Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether)<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

Added mobs: Aerglow Fish, Quail and Venomite

</details>

[**Aether Redux**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux)<details>
<summary>Added</summary>
Added mobs: Blightbunny, Mykapod, Shimmercow and Vanilla Swet
</details>

</details>

[**Trials Chambers Backport**](https://modrinth.com/mod/trials-chambers-backport)

<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

Added mobs: Breeze and Bogged

</details>

[**Friends and Foes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge)

<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

Added mobs: Copper Golem, Glare, Iceologer, Illusioner, Moobloom, Tuff Golem, Wildfire and Crab

</details>

[**Mutant Monsters**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters)

<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

Added mobs: Mutant Zombie, Mutant Creeper, Mutant Skeleton, Mutant Enderman, Mutant Snow Golem, Creeper Minion and Spider Pig

</details>

[**The Undergarden**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)

<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

Added mobs: Gwib, Gwibling, Mog, S'mog, Scintling, Sploogie, Brute, Dweller, Gloomper, Stoneborn, Rotling, Rotwalker, Rotbeast, Forgotten, Nargoyle and Forgotten Guardian (Miniboss).

</details>

[**Just Enough Guns**](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-guns)
<details>
<summary>Added</summary>

Added mobs: Ghoul and Boo.

</details>



## [**Farmer's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) Compatibility

<details>
<summary>Farmer's Delight</summary>

Allows Caged mobs to drop knife-exclusive/scavenger drops if killed with the Arrow Cage Upgrade.
While it doesn't make much sense, it aims to give some use to the upgrade other than farming for music discs.

<details>
<summary>Added Drops</summary>

Pigs and Hoglins now drop Ham with the Arrow Cage Upgrade

</details>

<details>
<summary>Farmer's Delight Addons Compatibilities</summary>

[**Miner's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight)
<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>

Bats now drop Bat Wings

With Arrow Cage Upgrade:
- Spiders, Silverfish and Cave Spiders drop Arthropod
- Silverfish also drop Silverfish Eggs
- Squids and Glow Squids drop Raw Squid and Raw Glow Squid respectively

</details>

[**Nether's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight)

<details>
<summary>Additions & Changes</summary>

Hoglins now drop Hoglin Loins instead of Porkchops

Hoglins drop Hoglin Hide with the Arrow Cage Upgrade

Striders now drop Strider Slices

</details>

[**Ender's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enders-delight)

<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>

Just imagine they're ender-effective arrows or something...

With Arrow Cage Upgrade:
- Endermen drop Enderman Sight
- Endermite drop Mite Crust
- Shulkers drop Shulker Mollusck
</details>

[**Alex's Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-delight)

<details>
<summary>Addition & Changes</summary>

Bunfungus drop Raw Bunfungus

Bison drop Raw Bison instead of Beef

</details>

[**Twilight's Flavor & Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-delight)


<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>

With Arrow Cage Upgrade:
- Boars now drop Ham
- Minotaurs and Minoshroom drop Tomahawk Smeak
- Carminite Ghastguards and Ghastlings drop Experiment 115
- Ur Ghast drops Experiment 115, 113 and 110

</details>

[**Delightful**](https://modrinth.com/mod/delightful)
<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>
Goats now drop Goat Meat

</details>



</details>


</details>
